templates.name: Solah Somvar Vrat
templates.description: Sixteen consecutive Mondays devoted to Shiva — traditionally kept for strength of will and family wellbeing.

templates.name: Mangalvar Hanuman Vrat
templates.description: Hanuman Chalisa and Bajrang Baan every Tuesday — the classic observance for courage and protection.

templates.name: Shanivar Vrat
templates.description: Seven Saturdays of Hanuman recitation, kept to ease the influence of Shani.

templates.name: Guruvar Vrat
templates.description: Sixteen Thursdays devoted to Guru Brihaspati and Lord Vishnu, for wisdom and prosperity.

templates.name: Shukravar Vrat
templates.description: Sixteen Fridays for Maa Lakshmi — traditionally observed for abundance and household harmony.

templates.name: Budhvar Ganesh Vrat
templates.description: Seven Wednesdays of Ganesh worship, kept before beginning new ventures.

templates.name: Ravivar Surya Vrat
templates.description: Seven Sundays honouring the Sun, traditionally kept for health and vitality.

templates.name: 21-Day Hanuman Path
templates.description: Hanuman Chalisa every day for twenty-one days — a short, steady discipline to build the habit.

templates.name: Navratri – 9 Days
templates.description: Nine consecutive days of devotion to the Goddess. Set the start date to the first day of Navratri.
